about: Track a real external reviewer replay for AGI ALPHA Evidence Dockets.

---

## Objective

Complete real external reviewer replay for the latest L4-L7 Evidence Portfolio.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Reviewer used a clean fork or clean checkout
- [ ] Reviewer ran `AGI ALPHA External Reviewer Replay / L4`
- [ ] Replay artifact downloaded
- [ ] Artifact hashes reviewed
- [ ] Baselines reviewed
- [ ] Cost ledger reviewed
- [ ] Safety ledger reviewed
- [ ] Attestation completed
- [ ] No empirical SOTA claim without full baselines and independent audit

## Claim boundary

This issue does not attempt to prove AGI, ASI, empirical SOTA, safe autonomy, or broad scalability. It tests whether an Evidence Docket can be replayed and reviewed externally.
